summary: Count interview events in a given range and group by date
description: Count interview events in a given range and group by date. Endpoint: GET /c/{company_id}/interview/events/counters. Required parameters: start_date, end_date, company_id. Optional parameters include scope, timezone.

params.name: scope
params.description: Limit by request scope, can be: ‘my’, ‘all’ (default ‘all’)

example_request:
GET /c/{company_id}/interview/events/counters

Required params: start_date, end_date, company_id

Optional params: scope, timezone
